overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character exploring a detailed wooden saloon interior. The character walks through the main floor past patrons and the bar, ascends a wooden staircase, and explores the upper floor lounge area with card players.

scene_state.functional_zone: western saloon main floor with bar and dining tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the saloon main floor, passing wooden tables and the bar area

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the wooden bar counter polishing a glass
patron sitting at round table drinking from a bottle

entered.detail: large glass window with painted SALOON text and decorative lettering
long polished wooden bar with bottles and mirror backing
ornate wooden columns with decorative trim supporting the ceiling
wooden piano against the back wall near the staircase
circular tables with white tablecloths and wooden chairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a warmly lit Western saloon, walking past the entrance window into the main floor area. The wooden bar runs along the left side with a bartender working behind it, while patrons sit at scattered round tables. The space features ornate wooden pillars, framed paintings on the striped wallpaper, and an upright piano visible in the back near the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase connecting main floor to upper level

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep wooden stairs with white railings toward the second floor

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with white painted railings and dark steps
small rectangular window providing natural light to the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the main saloon floor and begins ascending a narrow wooden staircase. The stairwell is dimly lit with a small window on the left wall providing natural light. The main floor elements including the bar and tables fall behind as the character climbs toward the upper level landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor saloon lounge with card tables and seating

events.description: exits stairwell into upper floor lounge area with large windows
approaches and circles around a table where men are playing cards

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper floor lounge, observing patrons at card tables and looking around the room

notable_agents.action: group of four men sitting around a card table playing poker

entered.detail: wooden balustrade railing overlooking the main saloon floor below
rectangular tables with green felt surfaces for gambling and card games
tall arched windows letting in bright natural light
brick fireplace with wooden mantelpiece against the far wall
taxidermy deer antlers mounted on the wall above the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs into the upper floor lounge, a spacious room with exposed brick walls, large arched windows, and a wooden railing overlooking the main floor below. Several patrons sit at card tables playing games, while a fireplace with a deer head mount anchors the far wall. The character walks past the tables observing the scene before approaching a group of card players.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bustling main floor of a warmly lit Western saloon up into a quiet, elevated lounge. It begins by entering through the front window and gliding past a wooden bar and scattered patrons, moving through a space defined by ornate pillars and striped wallpaper. As the character leaves the main floor, the scene shifts into a dimly lit stairwell where the noise of the bar fades and natural light filters through a small side window. The camera then emerges onto the upper level, expanding into a spacious room with exposed brick walls and large arched windows that overlook the floor below. Finally, the movement carries the character past card tables and a fireplace with a deer head mount, closing in on a group of players in the lounge.
